```{r}
# fastqc
SAMPLES = [SRR3707574]

rule all:
    input:
        expand("Results/QC/{sample}_fastqc.html", sample=SAMPLES)

rule fastqc:
    input:
        "Data/{sample}.fastq.gz"
    output:
        "Results/QC/{sample}_fastqc.html",
        "Results/QC/{sample}_fastqc.zip"
    shell:
        "fastqc {input} --outdir Results/QC/"
```
